title: NightVisionPlusPlus
description: Nightvision done, easy - simple - customizable, With permission,custom messages, prefix/branding. Supporting 1.8 to 1.21+
body:
### Important Stuff for Server Owners
Latest Default Config ```yml # NightVisionPlusPlus Configuration # ========================================== # General Settings # ========================================== # If set to true, drinking milk will remove the night vision effect. milk-enabled: false # If true, players who had Night Vision enabled before logging out # will automatically have it re-enabled when they join the server again. enable-onjoin: true # ========================================== # Messages # # Supports Bukkit Color Codes (e.g., &a, &c). # Set a message to an empty string ("") to disable it. # ========================================== # Enable/Disable Message if player uses for themselves self-enable-message: "&a[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Night Vision Activated!!" self-disable-message: "&c[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Night Vision Deactivated!!" # Permission Denied Message if command is run for themselves self-permission-denied-message: "&c[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Permission denied" # Enable/Disable Message if player uses command for other player # This message is received by the player who sent the command others-enabler-message: "&a[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Night Vision Activated for {PLAYER}!!" others-disabler-message: "&c[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Night Vision Deactivated for {PLAYER}!!" # Permission Denied Message if someone runs it who doesn't have permission others-permission-denied-message: "&c[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Permission denied" # Enable/Disable Message if player uses command for other player # This message is received by the player whose night vision is enabled/disabled others-enable-message: "&a[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Night Vision Activated!!" others-disable-message: "&c[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Night Vision Deactivated!!" # Error message sent when player never played in this server never-played: "&c[NightVisionPlusPlus]: Player not found or has never played on this server!" ```
For Best stability on 1.8 use v3.3.0 --- # 🌙 NightVisionPlusPlus — Minecraft Night Vision Plugin (Spigot/Paper/Purpur/etc) **The last Night Vision plugin you'll ever need.**
A free, lightweight spigot plugin supporting every Minecraft version from 1.8 to 26.1+ with a fully customizable language engine. ### 🚀 Key Features - **Universal Compatibility:** Supports 1.8.8–1.12 (v3.x.x) and 1.13 up to the latest release (v4.0.0+). - **Works Everywhere:** Compatible with Spigot, Paper, Purpur, etc. - **100% Customizable:** Every single message, prefix, and notification can be changed in the config.yml. - **Toggle System:** Simple commands to turn night vision on or off instantly. - **No Particles:** Keeps the player's vision clean and free of annoying potion swirls. - **Persistent:** Settings stay active even after world changes or respawns or rejoins. ### 🛠️ Commands & 🔒 Permissions | Command | Description | Permission Node | Note | |---------|-------------|------------------|------| | `/nv` | Toggle your own Night Vision | `nightvisionplusplus.self` | Everyone has this by default | | `/nv ` | Toggle Night vision for someone else | `nightvisionplusplus.others` | Permission or operator needed | | `/nv reload` | Reload the configuration | `nightvisionplusplus.reload` | Permission or operator needed | ### 💡 Why choose this plugin? Unlike other plugins that hardcode their messages or break on older versions, NightVisionPlusPlus is built for server owners who want full control over their branding. Whether you run a 1.8 Factions server or a 26.1 SMP, this plugin "just works."
